title: rosa acicularis var. taquetii
intro: Rosa acicularis var. taquetii, also known as the Korean rose or Rosa taquetii, is a deciduous shrub belonging to the family Rosaceae, native to mountainous regions of Korea and China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rosa acicularis var. taquetii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support cardiovascular health due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to make topical creams, salves, and ointments for skin and wound care.
